title: Orange Town Under Buggy’s Shadow
description: On pages 21–22, the Orange Town conflict focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, with Buggy’s occupation testing Luffy, Zoro, Nami, and the townspeople.
scene: This part follows the pressure inside Orange Town as Buggy’s crew, the Straw Hats, and the people caught between them react to the escalating fight.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: me and that guy used to be in the same pirate ship.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: He was my comrade when we were still pirate trainees.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You say that he was your comrade!?

summary: The scene keeps the Orange Town arc moving by tying the immediate battle to the town’s fear, Nami’s motives, and Luffy’s instinct to answer cruelty directly.
